alerts.name: Scatter-Gather
alerts.sub: Funds fan out through intermediaries then reconverge
alerts.description: SCATTER_GATHER — Multi-GNN flagged 4 transaction(s) across 5 accounts (mean prob 0.48, peak 0.48).
riskIndicators: Ranks #1 of 42 alerts flagged in this scan by model confidence (top 2%) — high relative severity.
Account 8045CC910 forwarded ~94% of the funds it received straight back out (near-zero retention) — behaviour of a pass-through mule, not a business holding capital.
Account 81C6EA460 forwarded ~98% of the funds it received straight back out (near-zero retention) — behaviour of a pass-through mule, not a business holding capital.
4-hop chain inserts multiple layers between origin and destination with no apparent economic purpose — a hallmark of layering.

It is the CONFLUENCE of 2 independent signals on the same cluster — not any single pattern — that elevates this above normal activity. Whitelisting can't pre-clear this because the combination, not the entities, is what's anomalous.
